title: cyclosorus parasiticus
intro: Cyclosorus parasiticus, also known as the rattan fern or climbing fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is a tropical species that is native to Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The leaves of the Cyclosorus parasiticus plant are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote health and wellness.
